product_overview: IPPAN is a production-ready global Layer-1 blockchain platform designed to deliver unparalleled scalability of 1-10 million transactions per second, with integrated encrypted storage and a comprehensive AI/ML marketplace. The system features deterministic transaction ordering via a cryptographic HashTimer, quantum-resistant security, and an innovative "ipn.domain.tld" naming convention for decentralized identity and service discovery.
core_goals: Deliver the world's fastest and most scalable Layer-1 blockchain supporting 1-10 million TPS.
Implement a fully production-ready protocol supporting trustless timestamping, immutable proof-of-existence, and decentralized encrypted storage.
Provide an autonomous economic and staking system with keyless global fund distribution and M2M micropayments.
Create a distinct, collision-free IPPAN naming system with comprehensive TLD registry and domain fee structure.
Integrate a full AI/ML marketplace for model and dataset management, inference job execution, and proof-of-computation.
Ensure robust security posture including quantum-resistant cryptography, Byzantine Fault Tolerance, and hardened time synchronization.
Implement a hardened IPPAN Time system for latency-aware, quorum-verified, and auditable time consensus among validators.
Enable seamless cross-chain bridging, L2 integration, and archive mode for scalability and interoperability.
key_features: HashTimer v1 system to provide deterministic, auditable event timestamps with nanosecond precision and unique cryptographic digests.
Comprehensive IPPAN Round JSON Schema supporting BlockDAG structure with parent blocks for enhanced consensus and network resilience.
Enforced 32KB maximum block size with per-round ZK-STARK proofs for efficient finality and improved network throughput.
Hardened IPPAN Time system that uses NTP-style latency compensation, validator quorum consensus, MAD outlier filtering, and drift-based validator role gating.
Robust economic models including staking, reward distributions, and 1% fee collection on payments routed to a keyless global fund.
Distinct IPPAN naming convention with support for 100+ TLDs, sliding scale multi-year domain fees, and DNS integration for metadata and service records.
Quantum-resistant cryptography integration employing Ed25519 signatures and post-quantum algorithms (CRYSTALS-Kyber, Dilithium, SPHINCS+).
Full AI/ML marketplace supporting model registration, dataset curation, job bidding and execution, proof of computation transparency, and automated royalty distributions.
Production-grade P2P networking with NAT traversal, peer discovery, and secure TLS/DTLS communication.
Comprehensive UI/UX including React wallet with multi-wallet support, transaction composer, real-time fee estimation, domain management, and blockchain explorer.
user_flow_summary: Users register and renew IPPAN domains using the ipn.domain.tld naming convention, with real-time fee calculation and ownership verification via multiple proof mechanisms.

Validators participate in hardened IPPAN Time synchronization by exchanging signed NTP-style timestamps and achieving consensus through quorum voting and outlier filtering to maintain network-wide monotonic time.

Transaction submission via APIs or wallet UI includes deterministic timestamping with HashTimer and cryptographic signature validation, followed by inclusion in blocks respecting the enforced block size and canonical ordering.
Validators produce blocks referencing parent blocks in the BlockDAG, constrained to 32KB size limits; rounds finalize blocks with zk-STARK proofs verifying entire round states efficiently.

AI/ML marketplace users browse models and datasets, submit inference jobs to the job market, receive computational proofs of execution, and handle payments and royalties through integrated payment channels.
Node operators deploy IPPANCore instances configured for multi-server deployments using supplied production node configurations, enabling global distributed consensus and storage services.

Developers and integrators access the RESTful API endpoints for node status, transaction submission, address validation, genesis and node configurations, and CI Guard validation for production-ready code.
End-users interact with the React-based wallet interface for secure key management, transaction history viewing, multi-asset management with fiat conversion, and hardware wallet integrations.
validation_criteria: All blocks created must enforce the 32KB hard block size limit and reject oversized blocks with appropriate error handling.
ZK-STARK proofs of computation are generated per round and not per block, verified efficiently within expected performance bands.
The HashTimer v1 encoding and hashing produce stable 96-byte inputs and 32-byte digests that are cryptographically validated against payloads.
Time synchronization across validators meets quorum requirements (≥2f+1), rejecting malformed signatures, and filters outliers via MAD statistics to maintain monotonic IPPAN Time.
Ed25519 and post-quantum cryptographic primitives correctly sign, verify, and protect all transactions, timestamps, and consensus messages.
Domain registration and renewal processes respect the 20-year sliding scale fee schedule with multiplier application per TLD category, and DNS proof verification methods are functional.
AI/ML marketplace features including model/ dataset registration, job bidding, proof-of-computation, and royalty payments operate with full auditability and real-time metrics.
APIs respond with appropriate status codes and schema compliance for endpoints including status, transaction submission, node configuration, address validation, and CI Guard mock detection.
Comprehensive test coverage includes unit, integration, performance, and security tests, with continuous monitoring indicating no critical warnings or vulnerabilities.
User interface elements deliver intended user flows with full responsiveness, including wallet operations, domain management, transaction composition, and AI/ML marketplace interactions.
